CREATE TABLE transactions (id INT PRIMARY KEY, created_at DATETIME);
INSERT INTO transactions (id, created_at) VALUES (1, rdf_now_impl());
SELECT rdf_now_impl() AS current_timestamp FROM transactions WHERE id = 1;
CREATE TABLE users (user_id INT PRIMARY KEY, last_login DATETIME);
INSERT INTO users (user_id, last_login) VALUES (1, rdf_now_impl());
SELECT u.user_id, rdf_now_impl() AS current_time FROM users u JOIN transactions t ON u.user_id = t.id;
CREATE TABLE logs (log_id INT PRIMARY KEY, log_time DATETIME);
INSERT INTO logs (log_id, log_time) VALUES (1, rdf_now_impl());
SELECT l.log_id, (SELECT rdf_now_impl() FROM logs WHERE log_id = 1) AS subquery_time FROM logs l;
SELECT rdf_now_impl() AS current_transaction_time, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM transactions) AS transaction_count;
SELECT rdf_now_impl() AS current_time, CASE WHEN rdf_now_impl() IS NOT NULL THEN 'Transaction Active' ELSE 'No Active Transaction' END AS transaction_status;
SELECT rdf_now_impl() AS transaction_time, (SELECT MAX(log_time) FROM logs) AS last_log_time FROM transactions;
